StmtSimple.StatementText: (@P0 int,@P1 int,@P2 int,@P3 int,@P4 int,@P5 int,@P6 int,@P7 int,@P8 int,@P9 int,@P10 int,@P11 int,@P12 nvarchar(4000),@P13 nvarchar(4000),@P14 int,@P15 int) SELECT SUM(ipr.quantity) quantity, SUM(CASE WHEN ipr.feature = 2 THEN 0 WHEN i.status = 4 AND i.type = 3 THEN -ipr.amount ELSE ipr.amount END) AS amount, SUM(CASE WHEN ipr.feature = 2 THEN 0 WHEN i.status = 4 AND i.type = 3 THEN -ipr.discount_amount ELSE ipr.discount_amount END) AS discountAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN ipr.feature = 2 THEN 0 WHEN i.status = 4 AND i.type = 3 THEN -ipr.discount_allocated ELSE ipr.discount_allocated END) AS discountAllocated, SUM(CASE WHEN ipr.feature = 2 THEN 0 WHEN i.status = 4 AND i.type = 3 THEN -ipr.total_pre_tax ELSE ipr.total_pre_tax END) AS totalPreTax, SUM(CASE WHEN ipr.feature = 2 THEN 0 WHEN i.status = 4 AND i.type = 3 THEN -ipr.vat_amount ELSE ipr.vat_amount END) AS vatAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN ipr.feature = 2 THEN 0 WHEN i.status = 4 AND i.type = 3 THEN -ipr.total_amount ELSE ipr.total_amount END) AS totalAmount , COUNT( DISTINCT ipr.product_product_unit_id) ppuQuantity FROM invoice i JOIN invoice_product ipr ON i.norm_quarter BETWEEN @P0 AND @P1 AND i.norm_date BETWEEN @P2 AND @P3 AND i.company_id in (@P4) AND i.status in (@P5, @P6, @P7, @P8) AND ipr.feature IN (@P9, @P10) AND NOT (ipr.feature = @P11 AND ipr.code IN (@P12, @P13) ) AND ipr.norm_quarter BETWEEN @P14 AND @P15 AND i.id = ipr.invoice_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [globalagg1013]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1015] END
CASE WHEN [globalagg1017]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1019] END
CASE WHEN [globalagg1021]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1023] END
CASE WHEN [globalagg1025]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1027] END
CASE WHEN [globalagg1029]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1031] END
CASE WHEN [globalagg1033]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1035] END
CASE WHEN [globalagg1037]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1039] END
COUNT([easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[product_product_unit_id] as [ipr].[product_product_unit_id])
COUNT_BIG([easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[quantity] as [ipr].[quantity])
SUM([easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[quantity] as [ipr].[quantity])

COUNT_BIG(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[amount] as [ipr].[amount] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[amount] as [ipr].[amount] END END)

SUM(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[amount] as [ipr].[amount] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[amount] as [ipr].[amount] END END)

COUNT_BIG(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[discount_amount] as [ipr].[discount_amount] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[discount_amount] as [ipr].[discount_amount] END END)

SUM(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[discount_amount] as [ipr].[discount_amount] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[discount_amount] as [ipr].[discount_amount] END END)

COUNT_BIG(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[discount_allocated] as [ipr].[discount_allocated] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[discount_allocated] as [ipr].[discount_allocated] END END)

SUM(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[discount_allocated] as [ipr].[discount_allocated] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[discount_allocated] as [ipr].[discount_allocated] END END)

COUNT_BIG(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[total_pre_tax] as [ipr].[total_pre_tax] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[total_pre_tax] as [ipr].[total_pre_tax] END END)

SUM(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[total_pre_tax] as [ipr].[total_pre_tax] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[total_pre_tax] as [ipr].[total_pre_tax] END END)

COUNT_BIG(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[vat_amount] as [ipr].[vat_amount] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[vat_amount] as [ipr].[vat_amount] END END)

SUM(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[vat_amount] as [ipr].[vat_amount] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[vat_amount] as [ipr].[vat_amount] END END)

COUNT_BIG(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[total_amount] as [ipr].[total_amount] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[total_amount] as [ipr].[total_amount] END END)

SUM(CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=(2) THEN (0.000000) ELSE CASE WHEN [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=(4) AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[type] as [i].[type]=(3) THEN -[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[total_amount] as [ipr].[total_amount] ELSE [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[total_amount] as [ipr].[total_amount] END END)
[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[norm_date] as [i].[norm_date]>=[@P2] AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[norm_date] as [i].[norm_date]<=[@P3]
[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[norm_quarter] as [i].[norm_quarter]
[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[id] as [i].[id]

[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=[@P8] OR [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=[@P7] OR [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=[@P6] OR [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[status] as [i].[status]=[@P5]
[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice].[id] as [i].[id]
[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[norm_quarter] as [ipr].[norm_quarter]>=[@P14] AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[norm_quarter] as [ipr].[norm_quarter]<=[@P15]
[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[norm_quarter] as [ipr].[norm_quarter]
[easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[id] as [ipr].[id]

([easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=[@P10] OR [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]=[@P9]) AND ([easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[feature] as [ipr].[feature]<>[@P11] OR [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[code] as [ipr].[code]<>[@P13] AND [easyposbackoffice].[dbo].[invoice_product].[code] as [ipr].[code]<>[@P12])
